47:1:8.m: their deeds (referring to الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ - those who disbelieved)

47:2:5.m: and they believed/had faith (connected to عَمِلُوا in the ayah)

47:2:6.m: with what (connects to نُزِّلَ - was sent down)

47:2:15.m: from them (referring to those who believed in كَفَّرَ عَنْهُمْ)

47:3:18.m: their examples (referring to those who disbelieved)

47:4:10.m: then bind tightly! (command to many people)

47:4:13.m: as a free gift/favor (describing how something is done)

47:4:18.m: she puts down (until الْحَرْبُ does this)

47:4:19.m: the war (subject of تَضَعَ - puts down)

47:4:20.m: its burdens (referring to الْحَرْبُ - the war)

47:4:21.m: that (pointing to what was mentioned before)

47:4:25.m: he would have gained victory for himself (hypothetical in لَوْ clause)

47:4:30.m: with some (object of يَبْلُوَا - to test)

47:6:1.m: and he makes them enter (the object is ٱلْجَنَّةَ)

47:6:2.m: Paradise (as the object of يُدْخِلُهُمُ - He will admit them)

َ: (as the object of يُدْخِلُهُمُ - He will admit them)

47:6:3.m: he made it known (referring to Paradise in previous ayah)

47:7:2.m: those who (plural, referring to believers in ءَامَنُوٓا۟)

47:7:6.m: Allah (the one true God who is being disobeyed)

لَّهَ: Allah (the one true God who is being disobeyed)

47:7:7.m: he helps you all (if you help اللَّهَ)

47:7:8.m: and he makes firm (connected to يَنصُرْكُمْ - he helps you)

47:8:3.m: so [may there be] complete ruin (for them)

47:8:5.m: and he made (someone) lose the way

47:8:6.m: their deeds (referring to those who disbelieved in أَعْمٰلَهُمْ)

47:9:1.m: that (pointing to something far) (refers to what follows in بِأَنَّهُمْ)

47:9:2.m: because they (subject of كَرِهُوا - they disliked)

47:9:8.m: their deeds (object of فَأَحْبَطَ - so He nullified)

47:10:5.m: so they may look (connected to يَسِيرُوا۟ - they travel)

47:10:15.m: and for the rejecters of faith

47:10:16.m: similar things to it, its likes

47:11:1.m: that (pointing to something far) (refers to what follows in بِأَنَّ)

47:11:2.m: because (connects this fact to اللَّهَ مَوْلَى)

47:11:4.m: one who is protected/supported (in this ayah: showing the disbelievers have no protector)

47:11:11.m: for them (refers to الْكٰفِرِينَ - the disbelievers)

47:12:6.m: and they did good deeds (connected to ءَامَنُوا۟ - believed)

47:12:9.m: it flows (referring to الْأَنْهٰرُ - the rivers)

47:12:14.m: they disbelieved (subject of يَتَمَتَّعُونَ - they enjoy)

47:12:16.m: and they eat/are eating (refers to ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ - those who disbelieve)

47:12:21.m: a dwelling place (where the disbelievers will stay)

47:13:6.m: a strength/power (as object of أَشَدُّ - stronger)

47:13:8.m: your town (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)

47:13:9.m: the one which (feminine) (describes قَرْيَتِكَ - your town)

47:13:13.m: any helper (object of لَا in لَا نَاصِرَ)

47:14:4.m: upon clear evidence (from رَبِّهِ - his Lord)

47:14:8.m: it was made attractive (subject of سُوٓءُ)

47:15:2.m: the garden, paradise (the one promised to the righteous)

جَنَّةِ: garden, paradise (the one promised to the righteous)

47:15:5.m: the God-fearing ones (who were promised Paradise)

47:15:16.m: it changes/becomes different (referring to طَعْمُهُۥ - its taste)

47:15:36.m: he/it (referring to كَمَنْ - like one who)

47:15:41.m: water (as the object being acted upon)

ءً: as the object being acted upon

47:15:42.m: scalding hot water (being given to drink)

47:15:43.m: and then he cut into many pieces (their intestines)

47:16:6.m: when (referring to something that will happen in the future)

إِذَا: when (referring to something that will happen in the future)

47:16:10.m: they said (referring to the disbelievers who left from being with the Prophet ﷺ)

ا۟: (referring to the disbelievers who left from being with the Prophet ﷺ)

47:16:11.m: for those who (connected to قَالُوا۟ - they said)

47:16:24.m: their desires (referring to those who left the Prophet's gathering)

47:17:4.m: a guidance (that increases for الَّذِينَ ٱهْتَدَوْا۟/those who seek it)

47:18:1.m: Then do/So do (asks what happens next)

47:18:2.m: they look/watch (referring to the disbelievers in context)

47:18:4.m: the Hour (referring to the Day of Judgment)

سَّاعَةَ: Hour (referring to the Day of Judgment)

47:18:6.m: that she/it (feminine) comes to them suddenly

47:18:10.m: its signs (subject of جَآءَ - has come)

47:19:1.m: so know! (connecting to what follows: أَنَّهُۥ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ)

47:19:11.m: and Allah (the One True God) (subject of يَعْلَمُ)

47:20:1.m: and he says (connected to what comes before)

47:20:4.m: why not (expressing desire for something to happen)

لَوْلَا: why not (expressing desire for something to happen)

47:20:5.m: it (feminine) was sent down repeatedly (referring to سُورَةٌ/chapter)

47:20:9.m: a chapter (subject of نُزِّلَتْ - was sent down)

47:20:13.m: the fighting (mentioned in this verse about war)

قِتَالُ: fighting (mentioned in this verse about war)

47:20:18.m: a disease (in the hearts of hypocrites)

47:20:19.m: they look/are looking (at إِلَيْكَ - at you)

47:20:22.m: the one completely overwhelmed (in the look of one who faints from death)

غْشِيِّ: completely overwhelmed (in the look of one who faints from death)

47:21:5.m: he decided firmly (subject of the condition in فَإِذَا...فَلَوْ)

47:21:9.m: Allah (as the object being referred to)

47:21:11.m: better/good (for them) (object of لَكَانَ - it would have been)

ًا: (object of لَكَانَ - it would have been)

47:22:1.m: So, then + is/are? (Used to ask questions that expect a yes/no answer)

47:22:5.m: that (connects to تُفْسِدُوا۟ - you spread corruption)

47:22:6.m: you all cause corruption (connected to أَن)

47:23:1.m: those (pointing to people far away) (subject of لَعَنَهُمُ)

47:24:3.m: the Quran (object of يَتَدَبَّرُونَ - they reflect upon)

47:25:13.m: he made something seem very attractive (subject: الشَّيْطٰنُ)

سَوَّلَ: he made something seem very attractive

47:26:7.m: he sent down repeatedly (subject of Allah)

47:26:15.m: their secrets (object of يَعْلَمُ - He knows)

47:27:3.m: she (the angels) took them completely (subject of يَضْرِبُونَ)

47:27:5.m: they (males) are striking (وُجُوهَهُمْ وَأَدْبٰرَهُمْ - their faces and their backs)

47:27:7.m: and their backs (being struck by يَضْرِبُونَ)

47:28:6.m: Allah (as the object of أَسْخَطَ - angered)

47:28:10.m: their deeds (object of فَأَحْبَطَ - so He nullified)

47:29:9.m: he makes (something) exit (that Allah will expose أَضْغٰنَهُمْ)

47:30:3.m: surely We will show them to you

47:30:4.m: then surely you would have recognized them

47:30:6.m: and you will surely recognize them

47:30:7.m: in (connects لَحْنِ to what comes before it)

47:30:10.m: And Allah (as the doer of يَعْلَمُ - knows)

47:30:12.m: your (all of you) deeds (object of يَعْلَمُ - knows)

47:31:1.m: and we will most certainly test you all

47:31:2.m: until, so that (connects to نَعْلَمَ - we know)

47:31:6.m: and the patient ones (object of نَعْلَمَ - we know)

47:31:8.m: your news (referring to the news/information of those being tested in وَلَنَبْلُوَنَّكُمْ)

47:32:4.m: and they blocked forcefully (connected to كَفَرُوا۟)

47:32:9.m: the messenger (object of وَشَآقُّوا۟ - they opposed)

47:32:18.m: Allah (as the object being acted upon)

47:32:21.m: their deeds (referring to those who disbelieved and hindered from Allah's path)

47:33:5.m: Allah (as the object of أَطِيعُوا۟ - obey)

47:33:10.m: your (all of you) deeds (object of تُبْطِلُوٓا۟)

47:34:1.m: indeed/truly (emphasizes the statement about الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟)

47:34:3.m: they disbelieved (subject of وَصَدُّوا۟ - and they hindered)

47:34:4.m: and they strongly turned away/prevented (from سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ)

47:34:7.m: of Allah (object of يَغْفِرَ - will forgive)

47:34:14.m: Allah (as the subject of يَغْفِرَ - will forgive)

ُ: (as the subject of يَغْفِرَ - will forgive)

47:34:15.m: for them/to them (referring to كُفَّارٌ - the disbelievers)

47:35:2.m: you (all) become weak (after فَلَا meaning 'so do not')

47:35:10.m: and never/and will not (negates يَتِرَكُمْ - will deprive you)

47:35:11.m: he will decrease you all (object of وَلَن)

47:36:9.m: he gives you all (your rewards - أُجُورَكُمْ)

47:37:2.m: he asks you all for it

47:37:3.m: and then he welcomes you all

47:38:4.m: so that you all may spend

47:38:12.m: he is/becomes stingy (in response to مَن - whoever)

47:38:18.m: The Self-Sufficient One (a name of اللَّهِ)

47:38:29.m: like you all (object of يَسْتَبْدِلْ - he will replace)
